category_sources: Official fbida page describes exiftran as a command-line tool for lossless JPEG transformations that preserves EXIF data.
source_facts.description: transform digital camera JPEGs and their EXIF data.
display_name_sources: Official fbida page lists exiftran as one of the project applications.
docs_sources: Official fbida page is the project documentation surface for exiftran and lists resources including repository and release tarballs.
repo_sources: Official fbida page links a GitLab git repository for the fbida project containing exiftran.
tags_sources: Official fbida page says exiftran performs lossless JPEG transformations and preserves EXIF data.
source_facts.description identifies JPEG and EXIF transformation.
